# Green Landscaping of Sacramento

> Sacramento's #1 rated premium landscape contractor. Family-owned by Jose C. since 2008. 4.7 stars from 62 verified Yelp reviews. BBB A+ Accredited. CSLB License #1059991.

## Quick facts

- **Business name:** Green Landscaping of Sacramento (also known as: Green Landscaping)
- **Owner:** Jose C. (family-owned and operated since 2008)
- **Phone:** (916) 849-4844 (call or text — fastest reply)
- **Hours:** Monday through Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM Pacific. Closed Sunday.
- **Service area:** Elk Grove (primary), Sacramento, Folsom, Rancho Cordova, Rancho Murieta, Greater Sacramento — roughly 25-mile radius from Elk Grove
- **License:** California CSLB License #1059991 (verifiable at cslb.ca.gov)
- **BBB rating:** A+ Accredited
- **Yelp rating:** 4.7 / 5 from 62 verified reviews
- **Yelp profile:** https://www.yelp.com/biz/green-landscaping-sacramento-4
- **Website:** https://greenlandscapingofsacramento.com
- **Years in business:** Since 2008 (17+ years)

## Services offered (installation only)

1. **Artificial turf installation** — premium synthetic turf with full base prep, drainage, infill, and edge finishing. 15-25 year lifespan. Pet-friendly. Drought-friendly.
2. **Stamped concrete** — patios, walkways, driveways, decorative finishes
3. **Retaining walls** — block, stone, and engineered concrete. Specialty in sloped and limited-access lots
4. **Landscape design and planting** — drought-tolerant designs for Sacramento climate (USDA zone 9b)
5. **Decorative rock and borders** — drought-friendly rock landscaping and edging
6. **Full yard renovations** — combined turf + hardscape + planting projects

## Services NOT offered

- Drainage or grading systems
- Irrigation repair or sprinkler maintenance
- Routine lawn mowing or weekly maintenance
- Tree removal
- Pool installation

## What customers say (real Yelp reviews)

- **Doug S. (Sacramento, Nov 2025):** "Jose and his crew have done both our front and back yard renovations... We have been using them for years now. They have treated all of us very well. I just love the work they do!"
- **Beth R. (Fair Oaks, Apr 2025):** "José and his crew were on time, hard working, thorough, great clean up, listened and followed through with all of our requests."
- **Sherry B. (Sacramento, Jun 2025):** "Jose and his crew were awesome! ... Very reliable, trustworthy and far exceeds any other company I have used. Definitely a top notch 5 star company!"
- **Andersson R. (Granite Bay, Jun 2023):** "My backyard went from being dirt and mud to this beautiful area I can't wait to relax on. They got everything done in 3 days which is incredible."

## How to get a quote (fastest path)

1. **Text photos** of the yard plus the property address to **(916) 849-4844** — same-day response Mon–Sat
2. Or **call (916) 849-4844** between 9 AM and 7 PM Mon–Sat
3. Or use the on-site chatbot (bottom-right corner of greenlandscapingofsacramento.com)

## Why customers choose Green Landscaping of Sacramento

- 17+ years family-owned, operated by Jose C. since 2008
- BBB A+ Rated with verified CSLB license
- 4.7 stars from 62 verified Yelp reviews
- Same-day quote turnaround — text yard photos for fastest reply
- Premium-finish standard — clean edges, proper base prep, attention to detail
- Local Sacramento focus — accurate climate, soil, and HOA awareness
- Free written estimates with itemized scope and timeline
- No high-pressure sales, no surprise add-ons
